---
title: "Reproducible research in application - A question of balance"
subtitle: "The Fiji test is suitable for many situations in life"
id: material-screencast-gis-reproducible-research-4
order: 301
summary: "What is a good balance between effort and benefit?"
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
activities: []
assessments: []
labels:
  - basic
  - talk
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/material-screencast-gis-reproducible-research-4.md"
---




```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://fast.wistia.net/embed/iframe/6cwdd163ij?videoFoam=true"
  allow="autoplay; fullscreen"
  allowfullscreen
  frameborder="0"
  scrolling="no"
  class="wistia_embed"
  name="wistia_embed"
  width="100%"
  height="600">
</iframe>


## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
